title: gomphrena canescens subsp. erythrina
intro: Gomphrena canescens subsp. erythrina is a perennial herbaceous plant also known as the 'red gomphrena' or 'dragon's blood'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Gomphrena canescens subsp. erythrina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Gomphrena canescens subsp. erythrina can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to promote overall well-being and reduce oxidative stress.
